# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content

Make a new release with the newly added functionality and the most recent bug fixes.
title: Bump to version v0.9.0

body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content

Randomizes the Bernoulli kernel at every iteration of the EKP. The current version generated a single kernel matrix and used it throughout the inversion process.
title: Randomize Bernoulli kernel at every iteration
